title: SCP: Contained
description: A SCP mod inspired by SCP: Containment Breach
body:
![SCP:Contained Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f26468887ee771c00cc01d94b92f86b18c3c307.gif)

# SCP:Contained is a scp mod based on SCP:CB architectury, style and anomalies encounters
- **Usage of Create: Copycats + is recommended for advanced building**

## This mod aim to add SCP:CB and less known anomalies from the SCP community !

## THIS MOD IS STILL IN BETA, BUGS ARE TO BE EXPECTED
- **All textures/models/animations might be changed in the future**
- **All features/anomalies might be removed or reworked**

## Lists of the Anomalies (Credits can be found on Google)

- **SCP-005 Skeleton key**
- **SCP-006 Fountain of youth**
- **SCP-035 Possessive Mask**
- **SCP-109 Infinite water can**
- **SCP-113 Gender switcher (broken)**
- **SCP-131 Eye pods**
- **SCP-294 Coffee Machine** 
- **SCP-330 Please only take two**
- **SCP-409 Contagious Crystal**
- **SCP-420-J The best ___ in the world**
- **SCP-457 Burning Man**
- **SCP-458 Infinite pizza box**
- **SCP-500 Panacea**
